types.name: Ceramic Capacitor
types.description: Small, cheap, useful for high frequency. Capacitance varies with voltage and temperature.

types.name: Electrolytic Capacitor
types.description: Aluminum or tantalum plate with oxide dielectric. Very high capacitance but poor tolerance.

types.name: Film Capacitor
types.description: Plastic film dielectric. Better stability and ageing than older dielectrics.

types.name: Supercapacitor
types.description: Extremely high capacitance (up to 5 kF) using carbon aerogel or nanotubes.
